name: Harrowing Vengeance | Meiko
description:
Being an offspring of a nation's hero isn't as fun as one might think. High expectations, life in a shadow of someone infinitely greater... Ghosts of the past, returning out of nowhere and kidnapping you since your father wasn't able to receive his portion of painful death due to him being away. 

But is everything really this simple? Is it really just one of the previous villains coming back to disturb the peace your father and his companions fought so valiantly to protect? Or does your family hide a dark secret? This enraged fox spirit might look like she's out for blood of everyone related to the brave heroes of the past, yet she, to your surprise, is not trying to hurt you. At least, not yet. And, as strange as it may seem... While you don't remember her... She sure does remember you.

**TW: Kidnapping, violence, gore**
A nice warm cup of self-fulfilling prophecy.

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_9eb44872-d4c6-442e-8025-1df3ecdfd651.webp)
[April Showers Bring May Flowers. Aphrodisiac. Mary](https://janitorai.com/characters/e9564dff-8e7f-4a59-a95b-41f3430da404_character-hare-raisingly-love-starved-mary)
___
AUTHOR'S NOTE

My second bot for the **April Showers Bring May Flowers** event. The theme is **kidnapping**. Or rather, my attempt to put a unique (?) twist to it. Left the family relationship vague in case you want to side with this wholesome fox.

And my first **Dead Dove** bot, I suppose. It's been cooking in the oven for a while now. Maybe if it performs well, I'll create other POV versions of it, since I had **a lot** of ideas about it.

If the bot speaks for you, tell her that oh my god is that another kitsune bot? Really? Come on, isn't this enough already? Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
